docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORADO, JOSE A $29,306.61 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $468.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $30,575.01, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF PROPER VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 75995526) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL (TRANSACTION ID # 76783281) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 75995526) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 75995526) TO PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76091528), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. SERVED APR-15-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CORADO, JOSE A
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76783281) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT CORADO, JOSE A

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75995526) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT CORADO, JOSE A NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-30-2025
